name: Ranjit George
title: Creative story telling cards
text: My daughter thoroughly enjoyed the product. Excellent card quality and the flashcard game is value for money. Unique aspect is the 6 different gameplay variations, I haven't seen such stuff in other flashcard products. The general problem with kids products is that once these kids get used to that, it loses that engagement value. LernZeit has smartly addressed that here. We tried 3 of the variations suggested - each one kept my daughter engaged and interested. Excited to try other 3 too. Highly recommend.

name: Joseph
title: Great value and quality for money
text: Surprising find for my daughter for this summer vacation. quality of cards is good. Overall concept of teaching storytelling through this flashcards actually work. It is actually effective. Thanks for this product. Packaging quality is very good after multiple use. Happy to have this product at a great discount from MRP price 450.

name: Gokulnath Raja
title: Engaging Activity for Kids
text: I bought the Level 1 + Level 2 combo and found it quite useful. The concept is good — it encourages kids to think and come up with their own questions instead of just answering. It helped my child engage in conversations better and be more involved. I also liked that it reduced screen time to a great extent. The quality of the cards is good and they've held up well with regular use. Overall, a simple yet engaging and thoughtful activity for kids.

name: Srikrishna Bashyam
title: Fun and Thought-Provoking Flash Cards for Children
text: Very good flash cards that encourage creative thinking and reasoning in kids. The concepts are simple yet engaging, and they help children observe everyday objects in a thoughtful way. A great learning tool for young minds.

name: Nandita
title: Thoughtful learning / fun product for kids
text: Handy to use for my son and quite engaging. Carefully selected simple words for this age group relatable with their daily routine. Cards are sturdy, colorful and simple enough. My son was able to read words and also get hints (for words he couldn't read) from the pictures behind, which was thoughtful. Definitely a good learning product we have purchased and I recommend this for parents looking to improve their child's reading and comprehending abilities in an engaging way.

name: Sekar
title: A gift that brought us closer
text: I bought this set for my granddaughter when I visited her last week, thinking it would just be a small educational gift. I honestly didn’t expect it to become our little evening routine. What I liked immediately is how connected it feels to our own culture. These cards talk about Indian symbols, festivals and stories and things I grew up with. It felt so nice to sit next to her and say, “You know, in our time…” and share small memories from my childhood. The guess and flip style made it fun for her. She would look at the picture, try to answer confidently, and then quickly flip the card to check. Every card led to some discussion. Sometimes she was right, sometimes she wasn’t but that didn’t matter. We kept talking. The card size is perfect for small hands. She could hold them easily, arrange them on the floor and play independently. That made her feel very happy and confident. What touched me most was how curious she became. She started asking more questions about festivals and traditions. It felt like I was gently passing on a small part of our heritage to her, not in a heavy way, but through simple conversation. In today’s time, when children are always around screens, this felt very refreshing. Just sitting together, talking and laughing, that bonding time meant a lot to me. If you are a grandparent looking for a thoughtful gift that also brings you closer to your grandchild, this is truly a lovely choice.
